description: Use Socrata-powered open-data portal and SODA API mechanics for tabular city, county, state, or federal datasets. Use when a URL contains a Socrata domain or four-by-four view id, or when a selected source requires Socrata metadata, SoQL, pagination, export, or schema probing.

default_public_example.purpose: Platform smoke test only when Chicago is named but no view ID or topic is supplied.

access_boundary_rules: Public Socrata datasets normally allow unauthenticated bounded reads and CSV/JSON/GeoJSON exports.
App tokens improve quota and should not be treated as mandatory unless the response explicitly reports a missing token/key.
A single 403 should be classified as WAF_OR_BROWSER_REQUIRED or provider blocking when there is no explicit credential error.
priority_rule: exact source skill > explicit platform fingerprint > source/platform routing
